title: TOPReward: Token Probabilities as Hidden Zero-Shot Rewards for Robotics
summary: TOPReward is a probabilistically grounded temporal value function that leverages the latent world knowledge of pretrained video Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to estimate robotic task progress as a zero-shot reward signal. Rather than prompting a VLM to output progress values directly — which is prone to numerical misrepresentation — TOPReward reads task progress from the VLM's internal token logits. Across 130+ real-world tasks and multiple robot platforms it achieves high value-order correlation, far exceeding prior baselines on the same open model, and supports downstream uses such as success detection and reward-aligned behavior cloning.
